concerns.text: Phase 1.4 references data-model.md but data-model.md defines ModalityModel entity which has no corresponding contract schema. contracts/ only contains dataset.schema.yaml, task.schema.yaml, results.schema.yaml. Add modality_model.schema.yaml or remove ModalityModel from data-model.md.

research.md identifies PhysioNet and PubMed as 'NO verified source found' (⚠️ GAP), but plan.md Constitution Check table claims '✅ COMPLIANT' for Principle II (Verified Accuracy) without documenting how these gaps are resolved. Plan must explicitly state substitution strategy or mark as blocking.

Constitution Principle IV (Single Source of Truth) claims 'All figures/statistics trace to data/ rows and code/ blocks' but plan does not specify where StatisticalSummary entity (defined in data-model.md) is persisted or how it traces to data/ rows. Add explicit SSoT mapping for StatisticalSummary.

data-model.md defines StatisticalSummary entity with fields (t_statistic, p_value, wilcoxon_statistic, etc.) but plan.md Phase 3.2-3.3 does not explicitly reference creating/persisting StatisticalSummary records. Ensure plan step maps to this entity.
